title: First steps towards integrated use of environmental data
author: Gaël Lymer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This presentation is from the FAIR-EASE webinar held on 6 April 2023, 13:00-14:00 CET. FAIR-EASE presented the distributed and integrated services for observation and modelling of the Earth system, environment and biodiversity being developed in close cooperation with user-communities, the European Open Science Cloud (EOSC) and research infrastructures in their design and sustainable availability. 

 The meetings purpose was to involve external communities, share the FAIR-EASE vision and objectives, and receive feedback.
